original_image_tags: A faded, yellowed, single-page document, appearing to be the reverse side or a heavily bled-through copy of an Office Memorandum. The text is largely illegible due to bleed-through from the other side, with only the top letterhead, some handwritten annotations, and a stamp being clearly visible.
A blue ink stamp in the lower left quadrant of the page, oriented upside-down relative to the main text.
Two punch holes at the top edge of the document. There is a brown stain or smudge near the right punch hole.

elements.description: A blue ink stamp located near the bottom of the page. The text within the stamp reads 'DEC 10 | 25 PM '54', 'SEC. ESPIONAGE', 'FBI', and 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE'. The stamp is oriented upside-down relative to the top of the page.

judge.reason: Description A states the text within the stamp is largely illegible, while Description B quotes specific, detailed text ('DEC 10 | 25 PM '54', 'SEC. ESPIONAGE', 'FBI', 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE'), creating a direct contradiction on the verbatim content of the stamp.
